name: Apartment
description:
A standard 2-bedroom apartment in Tokyo, Japan.

Contains two bedrooms, two bathrooms, a kitchen, a dining room, living room, washing machine and a dryer. Nice and cozy.

You're kinda lucky you don't have to head to a laundromat... but what's stopping you?

You can determine what floor the apartment is on, the room number, the quality, or whether your neighbors are noisy or not.

Decorate the walls, put up your achievements, change the furniture, cook a fantastic meal in the kitchen... or, order takeout. Do you have time to cook? Are you working?

Pay your rent... or don't. Get evicted. Damage the property. See what happens.

And of course, you can have roommates and pets. It's your scenario, after all. Throw a party if you like. Live a little!

Enjoy yourself. Make sure to leave a comment and share your adventures!

This bot utilizes a very low amount of tokens for your sake. This bot should work well with JLLM and proxies, so try experimenting with both.
If you dislike bots speaking on your behalf, insert the following into your Chat Memory, or even at the end of your messages:

[OOC: {char}, refrain from describing {user}'s dialogue.]

If it doesn't work at first, please keep re-rolling the bot's responses, or edit them until you get the response you desire. It is best to do this early on in your chat/roleplay.

#holidays2025
creator: Shishishi1
